vkSj lans; gksxk% Vksy Iyktk ¼Iyktkvksa½ dk voLFkku ¼pSust½ yEckbZ ¼fd-eh- esa½ ftlds fy, 'kqYd lans; gS fd-eh- @pSust 30-500 ¼t;iqj ftys ds cj[ksM+k] pkanykbZ] ds ikl 59-260 fd-eh-@pSust 105-000 ¼Vksad ftys ds lksuok ds ikl½ 70-210 [Qk la- Hkkjkjkizk@13013@561@lhvks@10&11@thlh Vksad ¼18-700&165-00½ chvksVh] yhuk uanu] la;qDr lfpo fVIi.kh % fVIi.kh % fVIi.kh % fVIi.kh % ewy vf/klwpuk Hkkjr ds jkti= esa dk-vk-la- 594 ¼v½] rkjh[k 8 ekpZ] 2013 }kjk izdkf'kr dh xbZ FkhA -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th March, 2016 S.O. 660(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 8A of the National Highways Act, 1956 (48 of 1956), the Central Government hereby makes following amendment in the Notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Road Transport and Highways bearing S.O. No. 594(E), dated 08.03.2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely: (i) In Para 3, net road section length of 125.760 km (appearing in line 14) is modified as 129.470 km. (ii) Point 1 of Notes after Table 1 & 2 shall stand revised as under: The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plazas for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s)(chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable Km./Ch. 30.500 (near Barkheda, Chandlai District, Jaipur) 59.260 Km./Ch. 105.000 (near Sonva district Tonk) 70.210 [F. No. NHAI/13013/561/CO/10-11/GC Tonk (18.700 – 165.00) BOT] LEENA NANDAN, Jt. Secy. Note : The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide S.O. 594(E), dated 8th March.2013. Uploaded by the Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
